title: Tetragrammaton Sigil — YHWH Geometric Construction
description: Geometric construction of the YHWH sigil from the numerical values of its four letters. Each letter generates an angular position, arc, and frequency. The 4-point figure traces the 'signature' of the divine name.

letters.name: Yod
letters.note: Yod = 10/26 of circle = 138.46°; the seed point

letters.name: Vav
letters.note: Vav = 6/26 of circle = 83.08°; the connecting nail

letters.name: Heh2
letters.note: Second Heh = 5/26 of circle = 69.23°; breath echoes

connecting_lines.note: Yod to Vav — seed to spine
